gamelift.fleet.anywhereconfiguration.Cfn: Amazon GameLift Anywhere configuration options for your Anywhere fleets.

gamelift.fleet.anywhereconfiguration.Cos.Description: The cost to run your fleet per hour. Amazon GameLift uses the provided cost of your fleet to balance usage in queues. For more information about queues, see [Setting up queues](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/gamelift/latest/developerguide/queues-intro.html) in the *Amazon GameLift Developer Guide*.
